creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Goran, thanks for the update. 

Patch is ok, except the pkg-plist changes. They are not functional and actually not needed. Adding of PYTHON_PYOEXTENSION here have no sense, because current version of gajim support only python 2.x and since gajim 1.0.0 it will be installed via setuptools, s pkg-plist entries would be autogenerated. PORTDOCS entries are not required in pkg-plist - it's ok to define them in Makefile (if there is few of them) and ports framework will do the magic of conditional installation of these file with no charge. Disabling NLS option is not what every user want's too. Other pkg-plist changes are sorting alphabetically. Anyway, I'd prefer to no mix functional changes with style ones, so I just completely skip all the pkg-plist changes. Testing now and update soon along with the nbxmpp port.
